hypothesis: E-39: DenseForegroundHead auxiliary supervision. 2-conv head on FPN features predicts 28x28 foreground map, trained with BCE against GT masks (real from MoCA_Mask/CAD, bbox-generated for MoCA CSV). Core hypothesis: dense pixel-level supervision forces backbone to learn better spatial target representations, reducing overfitting. Inference remains bbox-only. If best_val_mIoU > 0.2893+0.005=0.2943, direction is worth 30ep verification.
